title: How to Report a Phishing or Suspicious Email
text:
Q: What should I do if I receive a phishing or suspicious email?
A: If you receive a phishing or suspicious email, please follow these steps to report it. Windows: Step 1: Do not click on any links or download attachments from the email. Step 2: Open your email client (e.g., Outlook) and select the suspicious email. Step 3: Click on 'Report Message' in the toolbar and choose 'Phishing'. Step 4: Confirm the report. macOS: Step 1: Avoid clicking on any links or downloading attachments. Step 2: Open your email client (e.g., Apple Mail) and select the suspicious email. Step 3: Click on the 'Message' menu, then select 'Mark as Junk' or 'Report Junk'. Step 4: If using Outlook, click 'Report Message' and choose 'Phishing'. Additionally, both OS: Step 5: Forward the email to the IT helpdesk at helpdesk@company.com with a brief description of why you find it suspicious. Step 6: Delete the email from your inbox. Step 7: Monitor your accounts for any unusual activity. Reporting helps us protect the entire organization from potential threats.
